title.en: Trump presence means two-hour queues for World Cup final
title.zh-CN: 特朗普的出席意味着世界杯决赛排队两小时

summary.en: Supporters are facing hours of queues to get into New York New Jersey Stadium amid heightened security for the 2026 World Cup final.
summary.zh-CN: 在2026年世界杯决赛的安全性提高之际，球迷们正面临数小时的排队等待进入纽约新泽西体育场。

title.en: How the World Cup has affected your Premier League team
title.zh-CN: 世界杯如何影响您的英超球队

summary.en: Once the trophy is lifted by either Spain or Argentina in New Jersey on Sunday night, attention will shift from the 2026 World Cup to the upcoming domestic season.
summary.zh-CN: 一旦西班牙或阿根廷在周日晚上在新泽西举起奖杯，人们的注意力将从2026年世界杯转移到即将到来的国内赛季。

title.en: Has Saka shown Tuchel he's too good to leave out?
title.zh-CN: Saka有没有给Tuchel看过他太好了，不能离开？

summary.en: Bukayo Saka’s World Cup hat-trick against France reignited the selection debate and Thomas Tuchel’s decision to leave him out of the semi-final.
summary.zh-CN: 布卡约·萨卡（ Bukayo Saka ）对法国的世界杯帽子戏法重新引发了选拔辩论，托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）决定将他排除在半决赛之外。

title.en: Best England team for a long time - that's a fact, says Rice
title.zh-CN: 赖斯说，长期以来最好的英格兰队-这是事实

summary.en: Midfielder Declan Rice says "this is the best England group for a very long time" after they secure a third-placed finish at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 中场球员德克兰·赖斯（ Declan Rice ）在世界杯上获得第三名后说： “这是很长一段时间以来英格兰最好的球队”。

title.en: Bellingham breaks England World Cup goals record
title.zh-CN: 贝灵厄姆打破英格兰世界杯进球纪录

summary.en: Jude Bellingham becomes the first Englishman to score seven goals at a single World Cup with a late strike against France.
summary.zh-CN: 裘德·贝林汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）成为第一位在对阵法国的比赛中打进7球的英国人。

title.en: England beat France in 10-goal thriller to win third-place play-off
title.zh-CN: 英格兰队在10球惊悚片中击败法国队，赢得第三名附加赛

summary.en: Bukayo Saka scores a hat-trick as England beat France 6-4 in a thriller to record their best men's World Cup finish since 1966.
summary.zh-CN: Bukayo Saka获得帽子戏法，英格兰队以惊悚片以6比4击败法国队，创下了自1966年以来最好的男子世界杯决赛纪录。

title.en: World Cup quiz: Can you name every winner?
title.zh-CN: 世界杯测验：你能说出每个获胜者的名字吗？

summary.en: With the World Cup final taking place on Sunday, put your knowledge of the previous winners to the test.
summary.zh-CN: 世界杯决赛将于周日举行，请考验您对前几届获胜者的了解。

title.en: World Cup set for longest half-time in tournament's history
title.zh-CN: 世界杯创造了比赛历史上最长的半场时间

summary.en: Half-time at the World Cup final between Spain and Argentina is set to be the longest in the tournament's history.
summary.zh-CN: 西班牙和阿根廷之间的世界杯决赛中场休息时间将是比赛历史上最长的。

title.en: Brilliant first half, turbulent second - Tuchel
title.zh-CN: 辉煌的上半场，动荡的第二场- Tuchel

summary.en: England manager praises his players as England beat France 6-4 for third place in the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队经理称赞他的球员，因为英格兰队在2026年世界杯上以6比4击败法国队获得第三名

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 42
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星42号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

title.en: England's best World Cup for 60 years - but how should it be judged?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰60年来最好的世界杯-但应该如何评判？

summary.en: England have secured their best men's World Cup finish since winning the tournament 60 years ago. Is their performance at the 2026 edition being under-appreciated?
summary.zh-CN: 自60年前赢得比赛以来，英格兰队已经取得了他们最好的男子世界杯决赛。他们在2026年的表现是否被低估了？
